channel.title: ACIM Daily Minute
channel.description: Daily readings from A Course in Miracles. One-minute text passages and the 365 Workbook Lessons.

item.title: Daily Minute — May 10, 2026
item.description: The body’s eyes see ONLY form. They cannot see beyond what they were MADE to see. And they were made to look on error, and not see past it.Theirs is indeed a strange perception, for they can see only illusions, unable to look beyond the granite block of sin, and stopping at the outside form of nothing.To this distorted form of vision, the outside of everything, the wall that stands between you and

item.title: Lesson 27: “Above all else I want to see.”
item.description: “Above all else I want to see.” Today’s idea expresses something stronger than mere determination. It gives vision priority among your desires. You may feel hesitant about using the idea on the ground that you are not sure you really mean it.This does not matter.The purpose of today’s exercises is to bring the time when the idea will be wholly true a little nearer. There may be a great tempt
